reasoning: The resolution criteria require a formally ratified peace treaty to be signed before the end of 2025. With only 10 days left in the year (as of Dec 21, 2025), reports from as late as December 16 indicate that although efforts are ongoing, there remain significant stumbling blocks, such as territorial disputes over the Donbas. In general, reaching a comprehensive peace treaty, followed by formal ratification, takes considerable time and there is virtually zero precedent for such a complex geopolitical agreement to go from unresolved sticking points to formally ratified within a 10-day period. The market estimate as of December 11 was already at 0.02, and all available recent evidence strongly affirms continued stalling or hurdles. A value of 0.02 accurately reflects these extraordinarily low odds.
